Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Megadev: A Development Kit for the Sega Mega Drive and Mega CD Hardware 101 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. Show HN: GitAgent – An open standard that turns any Git repo into an AI agent 58 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. Baochip-1x: What it is, why I'm doing it now and how it came about 235 upvotes, 31 comments
  4. Nmap in the movies (2008) 116 upvotes, 16 comments
  5. Generalizing Knuth's Pseudocode Architecture From Algorithms to Knowledge 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Cookie jars capture American kitsch (2023) 21 upvotes, 2 comments
  7. Show HN: Ichinichi – One note per day, E2E encrypted, local-first 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. Python: The Optimization Ladder 204 upvotes, 67 comments
  9. Sunsetting Jazzband 82 upvotes, 24 comments
  10. 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 1070 upvotes, 454 comments
  11. Show HN: Learn Arabic with spaced repetition and comprehensible input 36 upvotes, 9 comments
  12. Head of FCC threatens broadcaster licenses over critical coverage of Iran war 21 upvotes, 4 comments
  13. It's time to move your docs in the repo 27 upvotes, 7 comments
  14. Everything you never wanted to know about visually-hidden 21 upvotes, 5 comments
  15. In Praise of Stupid Questions 11 upvotes, 2 comments
  16. Online astroturfing: A problem beyond disinformation (2022) 65 upvotes, 32 comments
  17. Claudetop – htop for Claude Code sessions (see your AI spend in real-time) 12 upvotes, 3 comments
  18. An ode to bzip 50 upvotes, 28 comments
  19. Montana passes Right to Compute act (2025) 202 upvotes, 151 comments
  20. What happens when US economic data becomes unreliable 251 upvotes, 223 comments
  21. XML Is a Cheap DSL 207 upvotes, 206 comments
  22. Life as an OnlyFans 'chatter' 88 upvotes, 81 comments
  23. CSMWrap: Legacy BIOS booting on UEFI-only systems via SeaBIOS 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  24. Show HN: Zap Code – AI code generator that teaches kids real HTML/CSS/JS 6 upvotes, 2 comments
  25. Hostile Volume – A game about adjusting volume with intentionally bad UI 19 upvotes, 15 comments
  26. Starlink militarization and its impact on global strategic stability 72 upvotes, 94 comments
  27. Wired headphone sales are exploding 378 upvotes, 628 comments
  28. UBI as a productivity dividend 75 upvotes, 118 comments
  29. 2026 tech layoffs reach 45,000 in March 9 upvotes, 8 comments
  30. 9 Mothers Defense (YC P26) Is Hiring in Austin 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 4:00am, 15 March 2026. Source here.
